name: Sizzling Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole dried tomatoes in oil (drained and chopped)
1 tablespoon Walnut oil or salad oil
4 small Pita rounds, split and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. On a serving platter, arrange the torn mixed greens, pitted olives, chopped dried tomatoes, and sliced green onions.
2. Cover and chill.
3. For the dressing, in a screw-top jar combine the salad oil, tarragon vinegar, 2 tablespoons water, walnut or salad oil, and Dijon mustard. Cover and shake until well combined.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and 1 tablespoon water.
5. In a shallow bowl, mix the cornmeal, bread crumbs, toasted sesame seeds, and grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Divide the Chevre into 16 equal portions and shape each into a ball. Flatten each ball into a patty with a diameter of about 1/4 inch.
7. Dip each patty first in the egg mixture, then coat it with the cornmeal mixture.
8. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
9. At serving time, melt the margarine or butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the cheese patties and cook for 3 to 5 minutes, turning once, until golden brown.
10. Arrange the cooked patties on top of the greens mixture and drizzle with any remaining dressing.
11. Serve with pita bread wedges.
